---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you have in mind, including API changes, new endpoints, or model changes.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've evaluated and why they were ruled out.

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or references.
